updates.title: BIG GRAPHICS UPDATE
updates.message: OK this is about to be EPIC (its really not, but im excited abt it anyway). I learned p5.js, which means that you guys get a ton less lag with my crazy particles, and I get a cool looking website! Win Win! I will drop this crazy new update today or tommorrow or next week or in a few weeks o next year, so be ready because it is coming soon!

updates.title: Update Soon
updates.message: I will be updating the website soon. I am going to like, change some colors, and stuff.

updates.title: Another Monday
updates.message: What's up everyone? It's a monday, so you know everyone is just going to want to sleep. My monday has gone absolutely terrible so far, how's yours? I'm not really working on anything right now, so let me know your ideas in the chatroom or smt.

updates.title: New resource for Developers
updates.message: If you are web developer like me, and sometimes you have to work on a shool chromebook, then you know the struggle to impliment Javascript in your websites. That's why I made the developer's lab, a resource with a bunch of online tools, docs, and IDEs, as well as a html injector to inject single html files into a about:blank tab. This should make web development on school chromebooks much easier, so enjoy! To access the developer lab, just click and the develop button in the navigation.
